description: Pre-computed WTI crude oil historical volatility and move statistics, computed from Yahoo Finance CL=F daily close data.

regime_thresholds.description: Annualised rolling-30d vol thresholds for regime classification. Compare your computed vol against these to classify the current market state.
regime_thresholds.note: Above 50% is extreme. Below 20% is low/managed. 20-35% is normal. 35-50% is elevated.

weekly_move_stats.description: Absolute week-over-week close price changes (Friday to Friday).

rolling_30d_vol.description: 30-day rolling annualised historical volatility (close-to-close log returns * sqrt(252)).
rolling_30d_vol.note: Volatility spikes above 60% during major supply shocks (COVID-19 Apr 2020, Russia-Ukraine Feb 2022).

horizon_calibration.description: Empirical 80% CI half-widths at standard horizons, derived from weekly vol * sqrt(h/5). Use as calibration floor.
